  "detailed_context": "Alfredo is asking me to research the livekit-plugins-google or gemini online and make changes directly to a specific file at c:\\Users\\JOSE\\Downloads\\tentativa-50\\context-poc-voice-agent.md. He provided details about changing from OpenAI's GPT-4.1 mini LLM to Google AI Studio's Gemini 2.5 Flash model, including an API key he wants to use: AIzaSyD-tADc0pr6uz2eldjDFgdnZvTFsQWnHbE.
